name: Apple Cake with Caramel Sauce
recipeInstructions:
-------------------------------CARAMEL SAUCE-------------------------------
1 1/2 cups Brown sugar
1 1/2 cups Sugar
2 tablespoons Flour
1 cup Water
1/4 cup Butter
1 teaspoon Vanilla
1. In a bowl, place apples and sprinkle with sugar.
Stir and let stand while sugar dissolves.
2. Add egg; mix well.
3. Sift together flour, cinnamon, baking soda, and salt.
4. Stir into apple mixture along with nuts.
5. Pour batter into greased and floured 8-inch square pan.
6. Bake at 350°F for 35 to 45 minutes.
7. In a saucepan, combine sugars, flour, and water.
Mix well and cook over medium heat until clear.
8. Stir in butter and vanilla until butter melts.
9. Pour hot sauce over hot cake.
10. Serve with a dollop of whipped cream if desired.
